Secure at scale with humans + AI

Reduce risk continuously with AI and human-verified threat exposure management that uncovers, validates, and prioritizes your most critical vulnerabilities.

Get Started
Explore the Platform
Image

We protect the world's top innovators.

Our partnerships are rooted in trust, powered by innovation, and deliver measurable impact.

Customer Story

How Snap is pioneering AI with HackerOne AI Red Teaming

Read Snap's story
Customer Story

Adobe's formula for staying ahead of risk, with HackerOne's global research community

Read Adobe's story
The HackerOne Platform

One platform for continuous exposure reduction

AI and human insight working together to continuously find, validate, and help you fix the vulnerabilities that matter.

AI Red Teaming

Test and secure your AI systems against security, safety, and trust issues.

Bug Bounty

Uncover novel and elusive vulnerabilities missed by other controls with continuous researcher-led testing.

Code

Catch vulnerabilities earlier in development with AI and expert human review.

Pentest as a Service

Access methodology-based pentesting with real-time insights and reporting.

Challenge

Discover critical vulnerabilities with focused, time-bound offensive testing.

Response

Manage and resolve vulnerabilities with the industry’s leading Vulnerability Disclosure Program (VDP).

Hai

HackerOne’s agentic AI system that turns vulnerability noise into validated, prioritized, and remediated outcomes, helping security teams reduce risk at scale.

What's new at HackerOne

Image
Agentic AI: The Future of Exposure Management
Read Now
Image

Download the Report

Guide
Securing the Future of AI

Numbers that speak for themselves

ROI

per critical vulnerability before breach

critical vulnerability

increase

of customers

have Hai AI agent enabled

600k+
bugs

found & more discovered every day

1300+
companies

trust HackerOne

Success Stories

Hear what our customers have to say

Over the past decade, [HackerOne has] built an ecosystem that values customer and researcher feedback. Their pace of innovation, particularly in AI features, has been impressive.

Jim Higgins
Chief Information Security Officer @ Snap Inc.

The program with HackerOne has surfaced the most interesting results across all of our AI testing and is by far the most cost-effective.

Anonymous Security Leader
San Francisco based AI Research and Development company

Hai gives us actionable suggestions that have eliminated busy work, so we can complete tasks faster and think strategically about continuously improving our overall cybersecurity posture.

Clara Andress
Bug Bounty Operations Manager, Zoom

At TikTok, we always want to be proactive rather than reactive. We aim to shift left, finding bugs at an early stage to ensure the safety of our environment before it goes live.

Suhana Hyder
Vulnerability Management Leader, TikTok

Security is at the core of everything Coinbase does. HackerOne is essential to our ability to build a strong community and safe customers through engaging and rewarding the best ethical security researchers.

Philip Marten
VP of Security, Coinbase

Adobe's products are more secure thanks to our security team's collaboration with HackerOne and the security researchers we get to work with.

Jeff Sass
Senior Engineering Manager - Product Security and Incident Response, Adobe

We see the bug bounty program as a permanent part of our security program. Our developers are blown away by the ingenuity of the researchers.

Neil Matatall
Security Engineer, GitHub

Every organization has blind spots. Having the hacker community on the other side of the screen looking at those things you’ve missed means you can close those holes.

Matt Southworth
CISO, Priceline
Get in touch

Speak with a security expert

We can help you detect and resolve vulnerabilities before they are exploited. 

Image

Earn money, learn skills, be at the forefront of innovative technology:

  • Compete and collaborate with top ethical hackers
